_comment: ADF pipeline definition for the SEC EDGAR Bronze ingest.
4 activities run sequentially: tickers -> daily index -> submissions -> company facts.
The first two activities use Azure Function Activity for lightweight steps.
The heavier submissions and companyfacts stages use Azure Batch Custom Activity.
Import via: ADF Studio -> Author -> Pipelines -> ... -> Import from JSON.
deploy/deploy.ps1 injects the live Azure Batch host-executed command
for the submissions and companyfacts activities at deploy time.
Those commands unpack sec-edgar-task.zip from Blob staging, create the
uv-managed virtualenv on the Batch node, and run the target Python script
on the VM host (not inside a container).
AzureStorageLS is account-scoped, so folderPath must include the
The checked-in command values below are readable placeholders only.
name: sec-edgar-bronze-ingest

properties.description: Daily SEC EDGAR Bronze layer: ticker snapshot -> daily index CDC -> submissions -> XBRL facts

ingestDate.description: Partition date (YYYY-MM-DD). Set by the ADF triggers; override for backfill.

fullRefresh.description: False for daily CDC runs. True for monthly reconciliation against the full ticker universe.

activities.name: IngestTickersExchange
activities.description: Fetch the full SEC ticker-exchange snapshot across all exchanges -> bronze/company_tickers_exchange/

activities.name: IngestDailyIndex
activities.description: Fetch SEC master.idx, intersect with the full ticker universe, and write changed CIKs -> bronze/daily_index/

activities.name: IngestSubmissions
activities.description: Incremental SEC submissions for changed CIKs, or full refresh for the full ticker universe -> bronze/submissions_meta/ + bronze/filings_index/

activities.name: IngestCompanyFacts
activities.description: Incremental raw XBRL companyfacts for changed CIKs, or full refresh for the full ticker universe -> bronze/companyfacts/
